hub.title: Reports overview
hub.subtitle: Analytics hub for volume, SLA, resolution, channels, and exports.
hub.executiveDescription: Decision-ready KPIs, trends, and risk signals in one view.
hub.volumeDescription: Track complaint counts by status and period.
hub.slaDescription: Monitor on-time, active, and breached SLA trackers.
hub.resolutionDescription: Review backlog, closure rates, and resolution time trends.
hub.channelsDescription: Understand complaint intake distribution by channel.
hub.exportsDescription: Generate and download CSV, Excel, or branded PDF complaint exports.

volume.title: Volume dashboard
volume.subtitle: Complaint counts by status and time bucket.

resolution.title: Resolution metrics
resolution.subtitle: Backlog, closure rate, and average resolution time.

exports.title: Export centre
exports.subtitle: Generate and download CSV, Excel, or branded PDF complaint exports.

executive.title: Executive insights
executive.subtitle: High-signal overview for decision makers (real data only).
executive.intakeClosureSubtitle: Daily submission and closure activity (last 30 days).
executive.intakeClosureNote: Submitted = created on that day. Closed = transitioned to CLOSED on that day.
executive.channelsSubtitle: Share of complaints by intake channel.
executive.resolutionSubtitle: Backlog and average resolution time trend.
executive.quickPdfFailed: Failed to generate PDF export. Please try again.
executive.quickPdfTimeout: PDF is still processing. Please try again from Export centre.
executive.pdfNotice: Current PDF export is branded and tabular. Advanced Python/Seaborn visual PDFs need a separate analytics pipeline.
executive.platformSubtitle: Uptime and technical incidents will be added when APIs are available.
executive.platformNotAvailable: Platform uptime and incident metrics are not available yet.

empty: No data for the selected filters.

exportsTable.stillProcessing: Export still processing. Please try again.
exportsTable.expired: Export expired. Create a new export job.
